channel.title: ruby on Blog of Jason Meridth
channel.description: Recent content in ruby on Blog of Jason Meridth

item.title: Setup RVM and Ruby
item.description: I’m putting this here so that I have it saved. I’ve done this many times and until I automate it with a Puppet or Chef script….

item.title: Double Exclmations !! In Ruby
item.description: Today I hit this in a Ruby example online: def role?

item.title: Git post-merge hook to auto-fire rails migrations
item.description: I saw Scott Bellware recently write on twitter: for christmas, i really want a git hook to detect if an update has changes in the db/migrations folder

item.title: 'Bad Interpreter: No Medium' error when running Ruby from Git Bash
item.description: I opened my Windows VM last night for the first time in months to finally work on a .

item.title: Ruby Design Patterns by Russ Olsen
item.description: After nudging by Joe Ocampo and Scott Bellware, I finally sat down at finished “Design Patterns in Ruby” by Russ Olsen.
